Legend :

  • 👇 : Clickable area
  • PTS : Points
  • PL : Played
  • W : Wins
  • D : Draws
  • L : Losses
  • DIFF : Differential
  • BP : Bonus Points
  • Form 👇 : Results from previous games
  • Evolution 👇 : Ranking Evolution
  • W% : Win percentage
  • W5 : Wins by 5 points or less
  • W15 : Wins by 15 points or less
  • W+ : Wins by more than 15 points
  • L5 : Losses by 5 points or less
  • L15 : Losses by 15 points or less
  • L+ : Losses by more than 15 points
  • PF : Points for
  • PA : Points against
  • PFA : Points For Average
  • PAA : Points Against Average
  • TF : Tries for
  • TA : Tries against
  • TB : Tries bonus points
  • LB : Losing bonus points
  • YC : Yellow Cards
  • RC : Red Cards
  • OC : Orange Cards

How to support Allrugby
To help All.rugby grow, if you appreciate the site, the content, the work done...
here are 3 ways to show your support:
PREMIUM SUBSCRIPTION
3€ per month or 30€ per year
ad-free
increased data display
PREMIUM CODES
for a custom subscription
for yourself or as a gift
customizable duration
DONATION
